# R3VP - Tech.md

Project working rules for this session and all future sessions.

## Style

<!-- No em-dashes (--) anywhere in any file. Use a comma, colon, or restructure the sentence. -->
- Customer credentials MUST NEVER leave the customer environment (SOPS + age vault).
- Always update docs, README sections, CHANGELOG, screenshots, and phase docs as code is built.
  Do not wait to be asked.

## Tech stack

- Python 3.12 + uv workspace monorepo (apps/appliance + apps/api)
- Temporal.io Cloud for durable workflow orchestration
- FastAPI + SQLAlchemy 2.0 async + Alembic
- Next.js 14 App Router + Auth0 + React Query
- PostgreSQL 16 + asyncpg
- Veeam B&R REST API: v1.0 (Veeam 11), v1.1 (Veeam 12), v1.2 (Veeam 13.0.2+)
- pyVmomi for VMware vCenter
- pywin32 WMI for Hyper-V (Windows-only, manual install)
- boto3 for AWS Backup
- azure-identity + azure-mgmt-recoveryservicesbackup for Azure Backup
- yara-python for YARA rules engine
- SOPS + age for secret encryption
- AWS ECS Fargate + ALB + CloudFront (Terraform)
- Packer HCL2 for OVA appliance build
